1. [Email Notification] — Trending stability issues (Crashes affecting more users)

2. [Slack, Email Notification] — New Fatal Issue (Crash Problem)

3. [Slack, Email Notification] — New Non-Fatal Issue (Non-Crash Issue)

4. [Slack, Email Notification] — Velocity Alert (Crash Issues with Sudden Spike in Count)

5. [Slack, Email Notification] — Regression Alert (Issues marked as Solved but reoccurred)

6. Crashlytics to Jira issue

translations.```sql\nSELECT\n COUNT(DISTINCT event_i:
```sql
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT event_id) AS number_of_crashes,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP("%F", event_timestamp) AS date_of_crashes
FROM
 `你的ProjectID.firebase_crashlytics.你的TableName`
GROUP BY
  date_of_crashes
ORDER BY
  date_of_crashes DESC
LIMIT 30;
```
translations.```sql\nSELECT\n DISTINCT issue_id,\n:
```sql
SELECT
  DISTINCT issue_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT event_id) AS number_of_crashes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT installation_uuid) AS number_of_impacted_user,
  blame_frame.file,
  blame_frame.line
FROM
  `你的ProjectID.firebase_crashlytics.你的TableName`
WHERE
  event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),INTERVAL 168 HOUR)
  AND event_timestamp < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY
  issue_id,
  blame_frame.file,
  blame_frame.line
ORDER BY
  number_of_crashes DESC
LIMIT 10;
```
translations.```sql\nSELECT\n device.model,\nCOUNT(D:
```sql
SELECT
  device.model,
COUNT(DISTINCT event_id) AS number_of_crashes
FROM
  `你的ProjectID.firebase_crashlytics.你的TableName`
WHERE
  event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 168 HOUR)
  AND event_timestamp < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
GROUP BY
  device.model
ORDER BY
  number_of_crashes DESC
LIMIT 10;
```
translations.```sql\nSELECT \n DISTINCT issue_id, \n:
```sql
SELECT 
  DISTINCT issue_id, 
  issue_title, 
  issue_subtitle, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT event_id) AS number_of_crashes, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT installation_uuid) AS number_of_impacted_user 
FROM 
  `你的ProjectID.firebase_crashlytics.你的TableName`
WHERE 
  is_fatal = true 
  AND event_timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 
    INTERVAL 7 DAY
  ) 
GROUP BY 
  issue_id, 
  issue_title, 
  issue_subtitle 
ORDER BY 
  number_of_crashes DESC 
LIMIT 
  10;
```
translations.一套 Firebase 即可打天下：其他服務還有 Google Analytic: One Firebase suite to rule them all: other services include Google Analytics, Realtime Database, Remote Config, Authentication, Cloud Messaging, Cloud Storage…
translations.上方 Tab 可切換到「SCHEMA」查看 Table 的欄位資訊或參考 [官方: The top tab allows you to switch to "SCHEMA" to view the table's column information or refer to the [official documentation](https://firebase.google.com/docs/crashlytics/bigquery-export#without_stack_traces){:target="_blank"}.
translations.不管是哪種方法，都是同個文字編輯器；在輸入完 SQL 之後可以預先在右上方自動完: No matter which method you use, it's the same text editor; after entering the SQL, you can preview syntax checks and the estimated query cost at the top right ( `This query will process XXX when run.` ):
translations.串接 Crashlytics 和 Big Query 自動轉發閃退記錄到 Sla: Integrate Crashlytics and Big Query to Automatically Forward Crash Logs to Slack Channel
translations.以上 Integrations 的內容、規則都無法客製化。\n\n: The above integrations and rules cannot be customized.
translations.以至於根本沒有解決 Crashlytics 難以自動追蹤的問題，一樣要花很多時間: So it doesn't solve the issue of Crashlytics being hard to track automatically, still requiring a lot of time to review whether the problem is important.
translations.先上成果圖，每週定時查詢 Crashlytics 閃退紀錄；篩選出閃退次數前 1: First, the result image: Weekly scheduled queries of Crashlytics crash records; filtering out the top 10 issues with the most crashes; sending the message to a Slack channel, making it easy for all iOS teammates to quickly understand the current stability.
translations.免費、安裝便利快速\n: Free, easy and quick to install
translations.前往 GCP -&gt; Big Query 後可在左方「Exploer」中選擇: Go to GCP -> Big Query, then on the left under "Explorer," select "firebase_crashlytics" -> choose your Table name -> "Details" -> on the right, you can view Table information, including the last modified time, used storage, retention period, and more.
translations.前往 [Google Apps Script 首頁](https://scrip: Go to the [Google Apps Script homepage](https://script.google.com/home){:target="_blank"} -> log in with the same account as Big Query -> click "New Project" at the top left, then rename the project by clicking the top left again after opening the new project.
translations.參考 [官方文件](https://developers.google.com/: Refer to the [official documentation](https://developers.google.com/apps-script/advanced/bigquery){:target="_blank"} example and insert the above Query SQL.
translations.可以看到是一個二維陣列。\n\n: You can see that it is a two-dimensional array.
translations.在上述程式碼下方繼續加入新 Function。\n\n: Add a new function below the code above.
translations.如果你想追的是 App Crash-Free Users Rate，可參考下篇「: If you want to track the App Crash-Free Users Rate, please refer to the next article: "[Crashlytics + Google Analytics Automated Query for App Crash-Free Users Rate](../793cb8f89b72/)"
translations.或直接點「COMPOSE NEW QUERY」開一個空白的 Query Edit: Or directly click "COMPOSE NEW QUERY" to open a blank Query Editor:
translations.接下來請在上方的選擇「sendTop10CrashToSlack」Functio: Next, select the "sendTop10CrashToSlack" function above, then click Debug or Run to test it once. Since the first run requires authentication, please execute it at least once before proceeding to the next step.
translations.於 App 開發者來說 Crash-Free Rate 可以說是最重要的衡量指標: For app developers, the Crash-Free Rate is arguably the most important metric. It represents the percentage of users who **did not experience** a crash. I believe every app aims for a Crash-Free Rate close to 99.9%. However, in reality, this is impossible. Any software can have bugs, and some crashes are caused by underlying (Apple) or third-party SDK issues. Additionally, the Crash-Free Rate can be affected by the DAU size; the higher the DAU, the more likely it is to encounter rare crash issues.
translations.於左方選擇鬧鐘圖案，再選擇右下方「+ Add Trigger」。\n\n: Select the alarm clock icon on the left, then choose "+ Add Trigger" at the bottom right.
translations.既然 100% 不會閃退的 App 並不存在，那如何追蹤、處理閃退就是一件很重要: Since a 100% crash-free app does not exist, tracking and handling crashes is very important. Besides the most common [Google Firebase Crashlytics](https://firebase.google.com/products/crashlytics){:target="_blank"} (formerly Fabric), there are other options like [Bugsnag](https://www.bugsnag.com/){:target="_blank"} and [Bugfender](https://bugfender.com/){:target="_blank"}. I haven't personally compared these tools, so interested readers can explore them on their own. If you use other tools, the content of this article may not apply.
translations.更多範例請參考 [官方文件](https://firebase.google.c: For more examples, please refer to the [official documentation](https://firebase.google.com/docs/crashlytics/bigquery-export#example_4_filter_by_custom_key){:target="_blank"}.
translations.最一開始我們直接使用 2.New Fatal Issue to Slack or: At first, we directly used 2.New Fatal Issue to Slack or Email. For Email, it was then triggered by [Google Apps Script for further processing](../d414bdbdb8c9/); however, this notification would flood the channel because it alerted on every crash, whether major or minor, even those caused by rare device or iOS issues. As DAU grew, the channel was overwhelmed with these notifications daily, but only about 10% were valuable—those that many users encountered and were related to our code errors.
translations.最痛的就是 Integrations 支援跟彈性極差再加上又沒有 API 可以自: The biggest pain point is the poor support and flexibility of Integrations, combined with the lack of an API to write custom scripts for crash data; you can only rely on manually checking Crashlytics from time to time to track crash records and issues.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.此時你的 Google Apps Script 專案應該會有上述兩個 Funct: At this point, your Google Apps Script project should have the two Functions mentioned above.
translations.比對 Crashlytics 的 Top 10 閃退問題結果，符合✅。\n\n: Compare the Top 10 Crashlytics crash issues, matches ✅.
translations.現在起，你只要在 Slack 上就能快速追蹤當前 App 閃退問題；甚至直接在上: From now on, you can quickly track current app crash issues directly on Slack and even discuss them there.
translations.確認要查詢後點左上方「RUN」執行查詢，結果會在下方 Query results: After confirming the query, click "RUN" at the top left to execute it. The results will appear in the Query results section below.
translations.第一個「Choose which function to run」(需要執行的: The first "Choose which function to run" (the entry point function to execute) should be changed to `sendTop10CrashToSlack`. The time interval can be set according to personal preference.
translations.聽說從前有個美食外送平台用 Firebase 來做整套後段的建置，然後，就聽說這: I heard that there was once a food delivery platform that used Firebase for their entire backend setup, and then, I heard this platform couldn’t pay the vendors.
translations.設好 Crashlytics Log to Big Query 匯入週期＆完成第: After setting up the Crashlytics Log to Big Query import schedule and completing the first data import, we can start querying the data.
translations.轉來轉去只找到這個方法，官方也只提供這個方法；這就是免費糖衣下的陷阱，我猜不管是: After searching around, this is the only method I found, and it's the only one officially provided; this is the trap behind the free offering. I guess neither Crashlytics nor Analytics Event will provide or plan to provide APIs for users to query data directly. The official recommendation is to export data to Big Query, and Big Query charges fees once free storage and query limits are exceeded.
translations.這邊參考第 2. 的官方範例修改，我們希望的結果是跟我們看 Crashlytic: Here we refer to the official example in section 2 and modify it. We want the result to match the crash issues and sorting as seen on the first page of Crashlytics.
translations.除閃退外，也可 Log Error Event (EX: Decode Erro: Besides crashes, you can also log error events (e.g., Decode Error)
translations.首先到 Firebase 專案 -> Crashlytics -> 列表右上方的: First, go to your Firebase project -> Crashlytics -> click the "•••" at the top right of the list -> then select "Go to BigQuery dataset".
translations.點擊右上方的「Query」可開啟帶有輔助 SQL Builder 的介面(如對: Click the "Query" button at the top right to open the interface with the assisted SQL Builder (recommended if you are not familiar with SQL):
